steps.title: Use the intercept shortcut
steps.content: An $x$-intercept is where the graph touches or crosses the $x$-axis. On the $x$-axis, the $y$-coordinate is $0$, so look for the point on the curve with the form $(x,0)$.

steps.title: Read the point from the graph
steps.content: The parabola touches the $x$-axis at its vertex, which is the point $(7,0)$. Since the intercept is written as $(x,0)$, the value of $x$ is $7$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The only $x$-intercept shown is $(7,0)$, so the answer is 7.
